name: minakeep
services:
  app:
    build:
      context: /Users/stevenna/WebstormProjects/minakeep
      dockerfile: Dockerfile
    environment:
      AUTH_SECRET: minakeep-local-auth-secret-change-me
      AUTH_TRUST_HOST: "true"
      DATABASE_URL: file:/app/data/minakeep.db
      LLM_BASE: https://llm.mina.asia/api/v1
      LOG_LEVEL: info
      MEDIA_ROOT: /app/media
      MINA_AI_TIMEOUT_MS: "15000"
      MODEL: qwen2.5:14b
      OWNER_PASSWORD: minakeep-local-password
      OWNER_USERNAME: owner
      PORT: "3000"
      TOKEN: sk-1d9390b2495d485fb234855edf4c79f0
    healthcheck:
      test:
        - CMD-SHELL
        - 'node -e "fetch(''http://127.0.0.1:'' + (process.env.PORT || ''3000'') + ''/api/health'').then((response) => process.exit(response.ok ? 0 : 1)).catch(() => process.exit(1))"'
      timeout: 5s
      interval: 30s
      retries: 5
      start_period: 30s
    image: minakeep:local
    init: true
    networks:
      default: null
    ports:
      - mode: ingress
        target: 3000
        published: "3000"
        protocol: tcp
    restart: unless-stopped
    volumes:
      - type: bind
        source: /Users/stevenna/WebstormProjects/minakeep/data
        target: /app/data
        bind: {}
      - type: bind
        source: /Users/stevenna/WebstormProjects/minakeep/media
        target: /app/media
        bind: {}
      - type: bind
        source: /Users/stevenna/WebstormProjects/minakeep/logs
        target: /app/logs
        bind: {}
networks:
  default:
    name: minakeep_default
